hierarchy.h1: font-heading text-6xl md:text-8xl font-black uppercase tracking-tighter leading-[0.9]
hierarchy.h2: font-heading text-4xl md:text-6xl font-bold uppercase tracking-tight leading-none
hierarchy.h3: font-heading text-2xl md:text-4xl font-semibold uppercase tracking-tight
hierarchy.body: font-body text-base md:text-lg font-medium leading-relaxed tracking-wide text-zinc-300
hierarchy.overline: font-body text-xs font-bold tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-[#0055FF]

layout_and_spacing.container: w-full max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 md:px-12 lg:px-24

buttons.primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center bg-[#0055FF] text-white px-10 py-5 font-heading text-xl md:text-2xl uppercase tracking-wider rounded-none hover:bg-[#3377FF] transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: inline-flex items-center justify-center bg-transparent border border-zinc-700 text-white px-10 py-5 font-heading text-xl md:text-2xl uppercase tracking-wider rounded-none hover:border-white hover:bg-white/5 transition-all duration-300

form_elements.input: w-full bg-[#111111] border border-zinc-800 text-white px-4 py-4 rounded-none focus:outline-none focus:border-[#0055FF] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#0055FF] transition-all placeholder:text-zinc-600 font-body
form_elements.label: block text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-zinc-400 mb-2

badges.default: inline-block px-3 py-1 bg-[#111111] border border-zinc-800 text-[#0055FF] text-xs font-bold tracking-[0.2em] uppercase rounded-full

images.alt: Football players silhouette in stadium at night
images.description: Hero background. Must use bg-black/60 overlay for text contrast.
Manifesto image for split layout. Use a subtle zoom on scroll if possible.
Use as a fallback or decorative background next to the actual Google Map iframe.

hero.layout: min-h-screen relative flex flex-col justify-center items-center text-center px-4
hero.requirements: Headline 'DESENVOLVE O TEU JOGO'. Location badge on top. Primary and Secondary CTAs side by side on desktop, stacked on mobile.

manifesto.requirements: One side high-impact image, other side bold text. Use heavy contrast.

three_labs.requirements: Cards for Technique, Performance, Position. Use solid surface style with hover borders.

development_process.layout: vertical timeline line with staggered horizontal content cards
development_process.requirements: 4 steps. Use numbering (01, 02...). Clean glowing accents on the timeline path.

why_playerlab.requirements: 6 features. Phosphor icons. Subtle surface flat background, pop on hover.

training_experience.layout: masonry or bento layout (e.g. one large image spanning 2 cols/rows alongside smaller ones)
training_experience.requirements: Zero or 1px gap. Hovering over images adds a black overlay with electric blue icon.

coaches.requirements: Coach images should be grayscale, turning to full color on hover.

faq.requirements: Shadcn accordion. Minimalist borders. Electric blue active state on chevron.

final_cta.requirements: Massive headline 'O TEU DESENVOLVIMENTO COMEÇA AGORA' and primary CTA.

testing_attributes.rule: MANDATORY: Add data-testid to all interactive elements for QA.

instructions_to_main_agent: Load Google Fonts 'Barlow Condensed' and 'Manrope'. Register them in tailwind.config.js as 'heading' and 'body'.
Install and use 'framer-motion' for scroll-triggered reveal animations. Wrap sections in motion.div.
Use Phosphor Icons or lucide-react (if installed) for UI icons.
Customize Shadcn components heavily to strip Vercel default styles (e.g., remove rounding, enforce strict dark colors).
Implement the form with actual submission logic to a mockup/backend endpoint.
Embed the Google Map using an iframe for 'Campos de Sanguedo, Portugal'.
All copy MUST be in Portuguese (Portugal).
